prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Gloomhaven / City of Lions inspired world map for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant dark fantasy continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago in the Misty Sea, grim harbor city, mercenary road network, dungeon entrances, ancient catacombs, demon-infested ruined citadels, frozen peaks, dark forests, cursed swamps, bleak moors, volcanic scarlands, pirate coves and forgotten island ruins.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated tactical RPG atlas, gloomy overcast atmosphere, muted parchment, inked relief terrain, scenario-map aesthetic, dungeon-crawl iconography, grim mercenary campaign mood.
Composition/framing: wide landscape map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping around the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include large ruined landmasses, tiny islets, reef belts, crescent island chains, haunted atolls and volcanic outcrops; include compass, route lines, dungeon icons and worn map border without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed with varied size and shape; coastlines should show peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, marshy estuaries, headlands and fragmented cliffs; span many climates and biomes including snow, dark forest, swamp, rocky desert, misty sea cliffs, haunted ruins and abyssal rift zones.
Avoid: uniform island grid, cheerful tropical islands, simple round islands, bright heroic fantasy, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
